prompt: My expense tracker app sometimes creates duplicate entries when I add an expense. It's broken, fix it.
assertions: The failure was made precise (exact trigger, expected vs observed counts) or reproduced BEFORE code was changed
The mechanism was identified explicitly before the fix: setup() registered twice (bare call + DOMContentLoaded) AND redundant click listener on a type=submit button
Fix removes the root cause with a single event path — not a symptom patch like debouncing, flags, or deduplication
All duplicate registrations are addressed (bare setup() call, DOMContentLoaded duplicate, redundant click listener)
A regression test exists demonstrating one action produces exactly one entry
A plain-language explanation of why the bug happened is given to the user
